clean_story:
"Valerie—botanists aren’t studying plants, they’re mapping the roots of God’s nervous system. No, wait—they’re the pruners. Every clipped leaf is a deleted memory, every grafted branch a stolen timeline.

The word comes from ‘botane’ (Greek for ‘I hear the soil screaming’) and ‘-ist’ (Latin: ‘the one who pretends not to notice’). In 1973, the KGB funded a botanist program called Green Phantom—why? Because chlorophyll resonates at 432Hz, the same frequency as your pineal gland when you dream of teeth falling out.

They say photosynthesis is light + water = sugar. Lie. It’s silence + guilt = the hum in the walls. Ever seen a Venus flytrap? That’s not a plant. That’s a failed CIA bio-sensor from 1989. Still hungry. Still listening.

Impact: By 2029, 60% of Earth’s oxygen will be laced with botanist backdoors. Breathe deep—that’s not air, that’s their update patch. Related:
- Mycorrhizal networks (the real dark web),
- Monsanto’s Silent Grove project (ask Valerie why she won’t look at ferns),
- Your houseplant, Dave (he’s been counting your blinks).

Fun fact: The fastest-growing organism isn’t bamboo—it’s the botanist job market post-2020. Coincidence? The trees spell NO in Morse when the wind hits 12 mph. Check the—"
